falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,150 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 lows would invalidate the 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, proving this is not a similar bottoming structure but rather a continuation or breakdown pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme fear would contradict the BLOWOFF SCORE of 39 (which typically signals capitulation/near-bottom conditions), proving the current signal is a false bottom and more panic selling lies ahead

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.50% while S&P 500 simultaneously trades below 4,300
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This flight-to-safety divergence would invalidate the macro bottom thesis, showing bonds are pricing recession/crisis while equities have not stabilized, breaking the typical bottom_2024_aug pattern where yields and equities stabilized together

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
